ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, high readability. Certificate issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce under ICC accreditation.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, high readability. Clearly structured invoice with item lines, weights, delivery and business addresses.

lc_check.lc_verification_note: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number is SEG-23D-787299 which does not contain any LC-related banking terminology.

locations_found: Invoice footer address block: 'Bakels Sweden AB, von Utfallsgatan 26-30, SE-40252 Gothenburg, Sweden'
Invoice header area: 'BAKELS' brand name with 'BAKERY INGREDIENTS SINCE 1904'
Invoice issuer address block at top: 'Bakels Sweden AB, von Utfallsgatan 26-30, SE-40252 Gothenburg, Sweden'

criteria_met: Consignor 'Bakels Sweden AB' identified in invoice as the issuer/sender (address block, header branding, and footer).
Consignee 'Parskak' identified in invoice delivery address and business address fields.
pairing_validation.note: Document pairing validated: certificate consignor matches invoice issuer; certificate consignee matches invoice delivery/business address party.

candidates.section: Box 1 - Consignor (implicit from address context and box 3)

candidates.raw_text:
40 Pallets Emulsifier Jilk 60
Stuffed into 1x40ft Container
with no: MIOU 505910-8
Seal no: 9418565
candidates.normalized_text: 40 pallets emulsifier jilk 60 stuffed into 1x40ft container with no miou 505910-8 seal no 9418565

Jilk 60
Hs no:21069098 Origin: SWE
SEGREGATED CU-RSPO SCC-827455
candidates.normalized_text: jilk 60 hs no 21069098 origin swe segregated cu-rspo scc-827455

candidates.raw_text:
Jilk 60
Hs no:21069098 Origin: SWE
SEGREGATED CU-RSPO SCC-827455
candidates.normalized_text: jilk 60 hs no 21069098 origin swe segregated cu-rspo scc-827455

consignor.invoice_value: Bakels Sweden AB, von Utfallsgatan 26-30, SE-40252 Gothenburg, Sweden

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.0 - Koncernstruktur / Name search in all files
comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Bakels Sweden AB' in all invoice pages and files.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND: 'Bakels Sweden AB' appears in the invoice footer address block, the invoice header branding ('BAKELS'), and the top-level address block. Exact match of full company name 'Bakels Sweden AB' in footer.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignor name 'Bakels Sweden AB' vs invoice issuer name 'Bakels Sweden AB'.

Certificate consignor country: Sweden (implicit from Göteborg address and certificate context). Invoice issuer country: Sweden (explicit in footer address block). Additionally confirmed by VAT registration number SE556042136301 (SE prefix = Sweden).

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - Consignor name found explicitly in invoice
Country verification via VAT number SE-prefix confirming Sweden

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor 'Bakels Sweden AB' is exactly identified in the invoice as the issuer, both in the footer address block ('Bakels Sweden AB, von Utfallsgatan 26-30, SE-40252 Gothenburg, Sweden') and in the header branding ('BAKELS'). The country Sweden is confirmed by the explicit address and the VAT prefix SE. The address differs (Box 13099 vs von Utfallsgatan 26-30) but per rule 4.1.5, address differences do not cause MISMATCH when company name and country match. Result: MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has 'Delivery address' and 'Business address' fields, both containing 'Parskak'. No explicit 'Invoice to' / 'Bill to' / 'Sold to' field is identified. The delivery address and business address both show the same party: Parskak.
comparison_steps.result: No primary invoicing field (Invoice to/Bill to/Sold to) is explicitly labeled. The only named buyer/recipient party in the invoice is 'Parskak' in both Delivery address and Business address fields.
comparison_steps.conclusion: Parskak is identified as the consignee per 4.2.1.1 fallback.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignee: 'Parskak'. Invoice delivery/business address: 'Parskak'. Exact match.
Certificate consignee country: Iran. Invoice delivery/business address country: Iran.

rules_applied.description: Priority identification - no explicit Bill-To field found; Delivery and Business address used
Alternative recipient address - no primary invoicing field, consignee identified in delivery/business address
Name verification - exact match: Parskak = Parskak

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee 'Parskak' is exactly identified in the invoice delivery address and business address fields. Both show 'Parskak, P.O.Box 16765 - 436, TEHRAN 0000, Iran'. The name matches exactly. The address matches (P.O. Box 16765 - 436, Tehran). Country Iran matches. Minor differences: certificate says 'Tehran' vs invoice 'TEHRAN 0000' — case and postal code difference are allowed normalizations. No explicit Invoice-To/Bill-To field was found, so the fallback to Delivery/Business address applies per 4.2.1.1. Result: MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate does not specify article numbers. No article numbers in certificate to match against invoice item numbers 225721 and 225715.
comparison_steps.result: Priority 1 not applicable — no article numbers in certificate.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in the certificate goods description: 'Emulsifier Jilk 60'. The core product identity is 'Jilk 60'. 'Emulsifier' is a product category descriptor. Search for 'Jilk 60' in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice item lines both describe 'Jilk 60' as the product description. The text 'Jilk 60' appears exactly in both item lines. 'Emulsifier' does not appear in the invoice item description, but it is a category descriptor, and the identity-bearing main designation 'Jilk 60' is an exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate contains additional text: '40 Pallets', 'Stuffed into 1x40ft Container with no: MIOU 505910-8', 'Seal no: 9418565'. Invoice also contains: '40 Pallets = Bakery Ingredients', 'Container No: MIOU 505910-8', 'Seal: 9418565'. These are packaging/logistics details, not identity-bearing. The container number and seal number match between documents.
comparison_steps.result: Additional details are consistent between documents. No contradiction.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation 'Jilk 60' identified exactly in invoice
Non-identity-bearing additions - 'Emulsifier' is a product category prefix; packaging/container/seal details are logistics info

evidence.raw_text:
40 Pallets Emulsifier Jilk 60
Stuffed into 1x40ft Container
with no: MIOU 505910-8
Seal no: 9418565

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description 'Emulsifier Jilk 60' — the identity-bearing main designation is 'Jilk 60'. This exact text appears in both invoice item lines (225721 and 225715), both described as 'Jilk 60'. The word 'Emulsifier' is a product category prefix that does not appear in the invoice description, but per rule 4.3.4 it is a non-identity-bearing addition that does not change product identity. Container number MIOU 505910-8 and seal number 9418565 match between certificate and invoice, providing additional corroboration. Result: MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because 'Emulsifier' appears in certificate but not in invoice item description
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: 'Emulsifier' is a product category descriptor (non-identity-bearing addition per 4.3.4). The identity-bearing main designation 'Jilk 60' matches exactly. The invoice also notes '40 Pallets = Bakery Ingredients' which is consistent with an emulsifier product being a bakery ingredient.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains two quantities: '23 552 Kg net' and '25 150 Kg gross'. Both have numeric value, unit (Kg), and weight category (net/gross). Both are valid verification-grounding quantities.
comparison_steps.result: Two quantities identified: NW = 23,552 Kg net; GW = 25,150 Kg gross.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate NW: 23 552 Kg net. Invoice footer summary: '23 552 Kg net'. After thousands separator normalization (space removal per 4.4.3.3): 23552 = 23552.
Certificate GW: 25 150 Kg gross. Invoice footer summary: '25 150 Kg gross'. After thousands separator normalization: 25150 = 25150.
Invoice also shows per-line net weights: 9,216.00 + 14,336.00 = 23,552.00 Kg, matching the total net weight. Invoice summary quantity also shows 23,552.00. No contradictions.

rules_applied.description: Direct identification - both NW and GW values found explicitly in invoice
Thousands separator normalization - space as separator in both documents
Weight category verification - both GW and NW explicitly stated in certificate and invoice
Multiple quantities - both NW and GW verified, no contradictions

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '23 552 Kg net' and '25 150 Kg gross'. Invoice footer summary explicitly states '23 552 Kg net' and '25 150 Kg gross'. After thousands separator normalization (removing spaces): certificate NW 23552 = invoice NW 23552; certificate GW 25150 = invoice GW 25150. Both weight categories match exactly. Per-line net weights in invoice (9,216.00 + 14,336.00 = 23,552.00) are consistent with the total. No contradictions found. Result: MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin indication in invoice. Both item lines state 'Origin: SWE'. 'SWE' is an ISO alpha-3 code for Sweden.
comparison_steps.result: Origin explicitly stated per item line as 'SWE'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate origin: 'Sweden'. Invoice origin: 'SWE'. Normalization: 'Sweden' ↔ 'SWE' (ISO alpha-3 code). Per 4.5.4, full country name vs ISO code is an allowed normalization.
Both item lines in the invoice show 'Origin: SWE'. Single origin country. Certificate shows 'Sweden'. Uniform origin.

rules_applied.description: Identification - origin explicitly stated as 'Origin: SWE' per item line in invoice
Normalization - full country name 'Sweden' vs ISO alpha-3 code 'SWE'
Uniform origin - single origin country across all items

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'Sweden' as country of origin. Invoice item lines both state 'Origin: SWE'. SWE is the ISO alpha-3 code for Sweden, which is an allowed normalization per rule 4.5.4. Both items have the same origin. The certificate's remark in box 5 also confirms 'We hereby certify that the origin of the goods is Sweden.' Result: MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.note: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate.
Each file contains exactly one document. Certificate file = 1-page COO. Invoice file = 1-page invoice.
Consignor 'Bakels Sweden AB' identified as invoice issuer. Consignee 'Parskak' identified in delivery/business address. Pairing valid.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor search in all files
rule_evaluation_log.note: Bakels Sweden AB found explicitly in invoice footer address block and header branding.
Exact name match: Bakels Sweden AB.
VAT number SE556042136301 confirms Sweden. Explicit address also confirms Sweden.
No explicit Invoice-To/Bill-To field found. Fallback to Delivery/Business address per 4.2.1.1.
Identity-bearing main designation 'Jilk 60' found exactly in invoice item lines.
'Emulsifier' treated as category prefix. Packaging/container details are logistics info.
Both NW (23552 Kg) and GW (25150 Kg) found explicitly in invoice.
Space as thousands separator removed for comparison: 23 552 → 23552; 25 150 → 25150.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Bakels Sweden AB kan identifieras i fakturan, mottagaren Parskak matchar fakturans leverans- och affärsadress, varubeskrivningen Jilk 60 finns i fakturans artikelrader, vikterna (23 552 kg netto och 25 150 kg brutto) är identiska, och ursprungslandet Sverige bekräftas av fakturans ursprungsangivelse SWE. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary_of_findings: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor 'Bakels Sweden AB' exactly matches invoice issuer. Consignee 'Parskak' with Iran exactly matches invoice delivery/business address. Goods 'Jilk 60' identified in both invoice item lines. Net weight 23,552 Kg and gross weight 25,150 Kg both explicitly confirmed in invoice footer. Origin 'Sweden' confirmed via 'Origin: SWE' per item line. Container and seal numbers also corroborate document consistency.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.invoice_value: Bakels Sweden AB, von Utfallsgatan 26-30, SE-40252 Gothenburg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning — företagsnamnet 'Bakels Sweden AB' identifierat exakt i fakturans adressblock. Land Sverige bekräftat via explicit adress och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Bakels Sweden AB' återfinns exakt i fakturans adressblock (fotnot och sidhuvud). Landet Sverige är explicit angivet i fakturans adress och bekräftas av VAT-nummer med SE-prefix. Adressskillnaden (Box 13099 vs von Utfallsgatan 26-30) påverkar inte bedömningen per regel 4.1.5.

sections.rule_applied: Mottagarnamn och land matchar exakt. Inget explicit Invoice-To/Bill-To-fält hittades, så leverans-/affärsadressen användes som fallback.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Parskak' identifieras exakt i fakturans leveransadress och affärsadress. Adressen P.O. Box 16765 - 436 matchar. Landet Iran bekräftas i båda fälten. Ingen motsägelse. Smärre formatskillnader (Tehran vs TEHRAN 0000) är tillåten normalisering.

sections.certificate_value: 40 Pallets Emulsifier Jilk 60, Stuffed into 1x40ft Container with no: MIOU 505910-8, Seal no: 9418565
sections.invoice_value: Jilk 60 (item 225721 and 225715); 40 Pallets = Bakery Ingredients; Container No: MIOU 505910-8; Seal: 9418565
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning — identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Jilk 60' exakt identifierad i fakturans artikelrader. 'Emulsifier' behandlat som icke-identitetsbärande tillägg.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Jilk 60' finns exakt i båda fakturans artikelrader. Ordet 'Emulsifier' i certifikatet är en produktkategoribeteckning som inte ändrar produktens identitet. Containernummer MIOU 505910-8 och sigillnummer 9418565 matchar mellan dokumenten, vilket stärker sambandet.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt identifiering — båda vikterna (netto och brutto) uttryckligen angivna i fakturans summering.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets nettovikt 23 552 Kg och bruttovikt 25 150 Kg återfinns exakt i fakturans fotnot. Tusentalsavskiljare (mellanslag) normaliserades. Fakturans radnettovikter (9 216 + 14 336 = 23 552) bekräftar totalen. Ingen motsägelse.

sections.rule_applied: Landnormalisering — fullständigt landsnamn 'Sweden' mot ISO alpha-3 kod 'SWE'.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Sweden' bekräftas av fakturans 'Origin: SWE' som anges vid varje artikelrad. SWE är ISO alpha-3 koden för Sverige, vilket är en tillåten normalisering. Samtliga artiklar har samma ursprung.

output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints MATCH with confidence >= 0.85. Comparison result IDENTICAL is consistent with all checkpoints being MATCH. Workflow recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result.
